chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.58 of 2019 Sheikh Rehan Ahmed Versus M/s Bank Islami Date Order with signature of Judge For order as to non-prosecution of appeal (Advocate for appellant not complied the Hon’ble Court order dated 4.2.20. Dated: 27.02.2024 None present. -.-.- Since last three dates appellant and his counsel are called absent and today is fourth date when they are called absent. There is no intimation either. It seems that they have lost interest in the proceedings. Instant First Appeal is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution. Judge Judge
